title: Filter by Multiple Boards on Chart
excerpt:
Currently, with multiple bords connected to a dashboard, each chart is limited to filtering by a single board. It would be nice if when using ‘advanced filters’ we could select multiple boards to add filters from. 
Inste…

posts.author: pmorales (Paige Morales)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, with multiple bords connected to a dashboard, each chart is limited to filtering by a single board. It would be nice if when using ‘advanced filters’ we could select multiple boards to add filters from.

Instead of selecting the board and then selecting the filters for that board, adding a ‘board’ selection before the ‘column’ slot would be great. This would enable us to have a chart with data from different boards appear on that single chart.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml: @pmorales if a marketplace add-on is an option, I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful, which allows creating charts from unlimited number of boards, filtering them by multible boards, and placing those charts into Monday dashboards.

posts.author: niclm (Nic)
posts.cookedHtml: Consolidate votes here: Applying the same filter to multiple boards
